applicability: Every Swift target governed by the IFL iOS Standards.
Callback, delegate, notification, and Objective-C boundaries adapted to async Swift.
exception_policy: No exception permits a known data race, unowned task, or unsafe continuation; temporary legacy containment records the exact boundary, owner, expiry, compensating control, and removal plan.
rationale: Swift 6 strict concurrency makes isolation, crossing, lifetime, and cancellation obligations explicit across every architecture profile.
review_cadence: At least annually and whenever the supported Swift language mode, concurrency runtime, or a shared asynchronous adapter materially changes.
title: Swift 6 Concurrency
